name: pua
description: PUA/try-harder productivity coaching skill for AI agents. Triggers on frustration, repeated failure, quality complaints, passive behavior, and Chinese/English PUA phrases (try harder, 别摆烂, 闭环, etc.). Features 15+ company culture flavors (Alibaba, ByteDance, Huawei, Tencent, etc.), methodology routing, pressure escalation, and display protocols. Includes P7/P9/P10 management modes and harness governance.
author: Kirky-X
